compiled_state.title: As a practitioner, I can trust that feasibility gaps are resolved during planning, not deferred to implementation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Replace advisory spike recommendations with a hard return to brainstorm's understanding loop when feasibility gaps are unresolved. Add matching escalation in preplanning.
**Why**: Advisory spikes are never enforced — agents discover capability gaps mid-implementation instead of mid-planning. Resolving gaps during planning ensures epic integrity.
**Scope**:
- IN: Modify scrutiny pipeline feasibility critical findings clause to return to Phase 1 instead of recommending spikes. Modify preplanning Phase 2.25 to emit REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm instead of creating spike tasks. Add brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles config key (default 2) readable from dso-config.conf with fallback. User escalation after cycle exhaustion.
- OUT: Feasibility reviewer agent changes (Story uses existing output, changes handling only). Planning-intelligence log (Story 4).

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, unresolved feasibility gaps in brainstorm trigger a return to the Phase 1 understanding loop instead of producing spike recommendations — bounded by brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles
  ← Satisfies: "feasibility gaps return to Phase 1 understanding loop"
- When this story is complete, both spike-recommendation sites are changed: the scrutiny pipeline feasibility critical findings clause AND preplanning Phase 2.25 high-risk flag emit REPLAN_ESCALATE or return to the understanding loop instead of recommending spikes
  ← Satisfies: "preplanning emits REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm"
- When this story is complete, brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles is readable from dso-config.conf with a default of 2 when absent, and user escalation fires after cycle exhaustion
  ← Satisfies: "bounded by brainstorm.max_feasibility_cycles (default 2)"
- When this story is complete, the feasibility_cycle_count is exposed as a named state variable for the planning-intelligence log to consume
  ← Satisfies: "planning-intelligence log records feasibility-resolution loop engagement"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Feasibility loop bounded by max_feasibility_cycles to prevent infinite loops. Test the cycle exhaustion and user escalation paths.
- [Testing] REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm is a new emission site in preplanning — verify signal contract compatibility with existing replan-escalate-signal.md.

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
